rewritten_requirements: The system shall track temperature, symptoms, medicine intake, and diet of registered patients.
The system shall view all information of patients from screening to discharge.
The system shall prescribe medicines to specific patients.
The system shall allow COVID-19 patients to update data and checklist of medical shops in their locality.
The system shall display the number of people infected (symptomatic and asymptomatic) and death in the user's locality.
The system shall provide a blog where recovered persons can share their experience.
The system shall allow COVID-19 Essentials Sellers to stock up essentials like masks and gloves according to infection in an area.
The system shall list medical shops nearby the area for COVID-19 Essentials Sellers.
The system shall assign workers to disinfect COVID-affected areas regularly based on infection data for Corporation Worker Heads.
The system shall allow the Admin to update the current number of infected people in a locality.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Track temperature, symptoms, medicine intake, and diet of registered patients.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Functionalities: temperature, symptoms, medicine intake and diet of the registered patient.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: View all information of patients from screening to discharge.

Medicines can also be prescribed to a specific patient.
